_schema.status: live | coming-soon. Live entries must have file.tag/name/sha256; the site build downloads the asset, verifies the sha256, and reads everything else (name, description, instructions, version, tables) from inside the .adf itself. Coming-soon entries render from the curated fields here.
_schema.file: Release asset in this repo: https://github.com/rawl-ai/rawl-agents/releases/download/<tag>/<name>. Assets are named <name>.adf; the version lives in adf_meta (key "version") and the release tag.
_schema.naming: Agents get botanical given names (ash, sage, willow, ...). The family signature is the filename: <name>.adf. Role lives in the tagline, never the name.

agents.tagline: A portable personal assistant that learns your environment and improves through use.
An ADF expert. Ask it anything about the format, the spec, or ADF Studio.

agents.name: willow
agents.tagline: An agent that builds agents. Describe what you need and it raises a new .adf.
agents.description: Willow scaffolds new agents: give it a goal and it creates the .adf, writes the instructions, wires the tools and channels, and hands you a file ready to grow.
